description: VS Code formatter extension scaffold (TypeScript + esbuild + pnpm) with pnpm/vsce packaging workaround.
configuration.title: Ark Format: Shell
config.enabled.description: Enable Ark Format for Shell Script files
config.indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indentation level
config.maxConsecutiveBlankLines.descript: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines allowed
config.removeLeadingBlankLines.descripti: Remove blank lines at the beginning of the file
config.insertFinalNewline.description: Ensure file ends with a newline
config.lineEnding.description: Line ending style (LF, CRLF, or Auto to preserve original)
config.collapseSpaces.description: Collapse multiple spaces into one (outside of strings and alignment contexts)
Ensure space before opening brace in function definitions
